notes: A spatialized footstep sound event (R-SYS-006): a DCC-imported clip (R-ASSET-001 — no in-engine audio authoring) routed to the `sfx` bus, positioned in the world and attenuated by listener distance between minDistance (full gain) and maxDistance (silent). The presentation-observer audio package triggers it off the deterministic sim path (R-SIM-001), reading the emitting entity's sim position to spatialize. This is the authored ctx:audio-event few-shot form an AI author should emit.
